text: A baker makes 6 cupcakes every hour. If he uses the letter n to stand for the number of hours he works, which expression shows the total number of cupcakes he makes?
generatorSolution: The baker makes 6 cupcakes each hour. After 1 hour he has 6 cupcakes, after 2 hours he has 12 cupcakes, after 3 hours he has 18 cupcakes, and so on. Each time, we multiply the number of hours (n) by 6. So the total number of cupcakes = 6 × n, which is written as 6n.
